title: Wall Street Is Replacing Traders with ML Engineers. Here's the Exact Roadmap to Become One.
description:
Goldman Sachs had 600 equity traders in 2000. Today it has 2. The rest were replaced by engineers.
p_i = e^(q_i / b) / Σ_j e^(q_j / b)
Citadel's ML team manages more capital than most banks. Two Sigma
